--bg:#0b0d12; --panel:#141824; --panel2:#1b2132; --line:#2a3145; --text:#e6e1d3; --dim:#8b8fa3; --gold:#d8a84c; --red:#d05252; --green:#6fbf8f; --blue:#5a9bd4; --orange:#e0813f; --white-r:#b8bcc8; --safe-b:env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px); } 貪婪深淵

*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;} html,body{height:100%;overflow:hidden;} body{ background:var(--bg); color:var(--text); font-family:"PingFang TC","Noto Sans TC",-apple-system,sans-serif; font-size:15px; line-height:1.5; background-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 120% 60% at 50% -10%, #171c2b 0%, var(--bg) 60%); user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none; } #app{max-width:520px;margin:0 auto;height:100%;height:100dvh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;} .screen{display:none;flex:1;flex-direction:column;overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;padding:16px 16px calc(20px + var(--safe-b));} .screen.show{display:flex;} h1.title{ font-family:"Songti TC","Noto Serif TC",serif; font-weight:700; font-size:44px; letter-spacing:12px; text-indent:12px; text-align:center; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f0d896 20%,#b8842e 90%); -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(216,168,76,.15); } .subtitle{text-align:center;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:6px;text-indent:6px;font-size:13px;margin-top:6px;} .btn{ display:block;width:100%;padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px; background:var(--panel);color:var(--text);font-size:16px;font-family:inherit; text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .08s, background .15s; } .btn:active{transform:scale(.97);background:var(--panel2);} .btn.primary{border-color:#8a6a2a;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#2a2416,#1e1a10);color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2px;} .btn.danger{border-color:#5a2a2a;color:var(--red);} .btn.small{padding:8px 12px;font-size:14px;width:auto;display:inline-block;} .btn:disabled{opacity:.35;pointer-events:none;} .row{display:flex;gap:10px;} .row .btn{flex:1;} .spacer{flex:1;} /* ---------- top bar ---------- */ .topbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:4px 2px 12px;font-size:14px;color:var(--dim);} .topbar .depth{ font-family:"Songti TC",serif;font-size:15px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2px; border:1px solid #3a3220;border-radius:8px;padding:2px 10px;background:#17140c; } .topbar .gold-chip{margin-left:auto;color:var(--gold);} /* ---------- class select ---------- */ .class-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:16px;} .class-card{ border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;background:var(--panel); padding:14px 12px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .15s; } .class-card.selected{border-color:var(--gold);background:#1a1710;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--gold) inset;} .class-card .ci{font-size:34px;} .class-card .cn{font-size:17px;margin-top:6px;letter-spacing:2px;} .class-card .cd{font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);margin-top:4px;min-height:3em;} /* ---------- camp ---------- */ .camp-hero{ text-align:center;padding:22px 0 14px; } .camp-hero .flame{font-size:42px;animation:flick 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;} @keyframes flick{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.82;transform:scale(1.05)}} .menu-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-top:14px;} .menu-item{ display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:12px;background:var(--panel);cursor:pointer; } .menu-item:active{background:var(--panel2);} .menu-item .mi{font-size:22px;width:30px;text-align:center;} .menu-item .mt{font-size:16px;letter-spacing:1px;} .menu-item .ms{font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);} .menu-item .arrow{margin-left:auto;color:var(--dim);} /* ---------- gear ---------- */ .slot-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin:12px 0;} .slot{ border:1px dashed var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 8px;text-align:center; background:var(--panel);min-height:74px;cursor:pointer; } .slot .sl{font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);} .slot .sn{font-size:13px;margin-top:4px;line-height:1.3;} .item-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;} .item-row{ display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:10px;background:var(--panel);cursor:pointer; } .item-row .in{font-size:14px;} .item-row .is{font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);margin-left:auto;white-space:nowrap;} .r-white{color:var(--white-r);} .r-blue{color:var(--blue);} .r-gold{color:var(--gold);} .r-orange{color:var(--orange);} .b-white{border-color:#3a3f4d;} .b-blue{border-color:#2c4d6e;} .b-gold{border-color:#6e5a26;} .b-orange{border-color:#7a4622;} .tag-new{font-size:10px;color:var(--bg);background:var(--gold);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 5px;margin-left:6px;} /* ---------- sheet ---------- */ .sheet-mask{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);display:none;z-index:50;} .sheet-mask.show{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;} .sheet{ width:100%;max-width:520px;background:var(--panel2);border-radius:18px 18px 0 0; border:1px solid var(--line);border-bottom:none;padding:18px 18px calc(24px + var(--safe-b)); animation:up .18s ease-out;max-height:78vh;overflow-y:auto; } @keyframes up{from{transform:translateY(30px);opacity:0}to{transform:none;opacity:1}} .sheet h3{font-size:18px;letter-spacing:1px;} .affix{font-size:13px;color:var(--green);margin-top:2px;} .sheet .base{font-size:14px;color:var(--dim);margin:6px 0;} .cmp{font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);border-top:1px solid var(--line);margin-top:10px;padding-top:8px;} .cmp .up{color:var(--green);} .cmp .dn{color:var(--red);} /* ---------- doors / decision ---------- */ .depth-gauge{ text-align:center;margin:8px 0 4px;font-family:"Songti TC",serif; } .depth-gauge .num{font-size:52px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:4px;} .depth-gauge .lbl{font-size:13px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:4px;} .depth-gauge .bonus{font-size:12px;color:var(--orange);margin-top:2px;} .door-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin:18px 0;} .door{ border:1px solid #3a3145;border-radius:12px 12px 4px 4px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#1d1826 0%,#141019 100%); padding:26px 10px 18px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;position:relative; box-shadow:inset 0 -10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.5); transition:transform .1s; } .door:active{transform:scale(.96);} .door::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:8px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%); width:70%;height:3px;border-radius:3px;background:#2c2438;} .door .di{font-size:38px;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(216,168,76,.2));} .door .dn{margin-top:10px;font-size:15px;letter-spacing:2px;} .door .dd{font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);margin-top:3px;} .retreat-btn{ margin-top:6px;border:1px solid #2f4436;background:#101a14;color:var(--green); letter-spacing:2px; } /* ---------- battle ---------- */ #battle{padding-bottom:calc(12px + var(--safe-b));} .enemy-zone{padding:6px 0 4px;text-align:center;position:relative;} .enemy-icon{font-size:64px;display:inline-block;transition:transform .1s;filter:drop-shadow(0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.6));} .enemy-icon.hit{animation:shake .3s;} @keyframes shake{0%{transform:translateX(0)}25%{transform:translateX(-7px)}50%{transform:translateX(6px)}75%{transform:translateX(-3px)}100%{transform:none}} .enemy-name{font-size:16px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:2px;} .enemy-name .elite{color:var(--orange);} .enemy-name .boss{color:var(--red);} .intent{ display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:6px; border:1px solid #4a3a2a;background:#1c150e;border-radius:20px;padding:4px 14px; font-size:14px;color:#e8c78a; } .intent .ii{font-size:16px;} .hpbar{height:14px;border-radius:7px;background:#22161a;border:1px solid #3a2530;overflow:hidden;margin-top:8px;position:relative;} .hpbar .fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#a83a3a,#d05252);transition:width .3s;border-radius:7px;} .hpbar.player .fill{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#3f7a58,#6fbf8f);} .hpbar .txt{position:absolute;inset:0;text-align:center;font-size:10px;line-height:14px;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 1px 2px #000;} .status-row{display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:center;margin-top:6px;min-height:22px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .st{font-size:11px;border-radius:6px;padding:1px 7px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--panel);} .st.bad{color:#e09090;border-color:#4a2a2a;} .st.good{color:#9fd8b4;border-color:#2a4a36;} .blk{color:var(--blue);border-color:#2c4d6e;} #log{ flex:0 0 auto;height:64px;overflow-y:auto;font-size:12px;color:var(--dim); border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.25); padding:6px 10px;margin:10px 0; } #log .l-dmg{color:#e8a0a0;} #log .l-heal{color:#9fd8b4;} #log .l-sys{color:#c8b070;} .player-zone{margin-top:auto;} .pz-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:13px;} .pz-top .pname{letter-spacing:1px;} .energy{margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:4px;} .pip{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #6e5a26;background:#17140c;} .pip.on{background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%, #f0d896, #b8842e);box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(216,168,76,.5);} .skill-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;} .skill-btn{ border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;background:var(--panel);color:var(--text); padding:10px 10px;text-align:left;font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;position:relative; } .skill-btn:active{background:var(--panel2);} .skill-btn:disabled{opacity:.35;} .skill-btn .sn{font-size:14px;letter-spacing:1px;} .skill-btn .sd{font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);margin-top:2px;line-height:1.35;} .skill-btn .sc{position:absolute;top:8px;right:10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--gold);} .battle-bottom{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;} .battle-bottom .btn{padding:11px;} .float-dmg{ position:absolute;left:50%;top:30%;transform:translateX(-50%); font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:#ff9090;pointer-events:none; animation:floatup .8s ease-out forwards;text-shadow:0 2px 6px #000;z-index:5; } .float-dmg.heal{color:#9fd8b4;} .float-dmg.blocked{color:#8ab4d8;font-size:20px;} .float-dmg.crit{color:#ffcf5a;font-size:32px;} @keyframes floatup{from{opacity:1;margin-top:0}to{opacity:0;margin-top:-46px}} /* ---------- loot / event / result ---------- */ .center-box{margin:auto 0;text-align:center;padding:20px 0;} .center-box .big{font-size:56px;} .center-box h2{font-family:"Songti TC",serif;font-size:26px;letter-spacing:6px;margin:12px 0 6px;} .center-box p{color:var(--dim);font-size:14px;} .loot-card{ border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin:14px 0;background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line);text-align:left; } .ev-text{font-size:15px;line-height:1.8;color:#d8d2c2;margin:14px 0;white-space:pre-line;} .choices{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-top:14px;} .stat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin:14px 0;} .stat-box{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:10px;text-align:center;background:var(--panel);} .stat-box .v{font-size:20px;color:var(--gold);font-family:"Songti TC",serif;} .stat-box .k{font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);margin-top:2px;} .potion-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;} .potion{ flex:1;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;background:var(--panel); padding:8px 4px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);cursor:pointer; } .potion .pi{font-size:20px;display:block;} .potion:active{background:var(--panel2);} .toast{ position:fixed;top:14%;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%); background:#1c150e;border:1px solid #4a3a2a;color:#e8c78a;border-radius:20px; padding:8px 18px;font-size:14px;z-index:99;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;pointer-events:none; max-width:80%;text-align:center; } .toast.show{opacity:1;} .section-title{font-size:13px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:2px;margin:14px 0 6px;border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding-left:8px;} .back-link{color:var(--dim);font-size:14px;padding:8px 0;cursor:pointer;display:inline-block;}
